creator: mikhail.rokhin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #13)
Does it mean, that I will never have KDE5 with my Core i7-3610QM or there is a way to switch off f16c obligatory?

"Try running *any* program that links to QtCore. For instance, /usr/local/lib/qt5/bin/xmlpatterns, or qtpaths, or uic" - both succeed, except qtpaths - there's no such binary.

Failed from /usr/local/lib/qt5/bin/ :
assistant
designer
qcollectiongenerator
qhelpconverter
qhelpgenerator
qml
qmlscene
qmltestrunner
